title: Will $100 Crude Derail Japan’s Wage Recovery? Middle East Tensions Pose New Threat to Real Wages
tags: Japan’s Proposed “Zero Tax” on Food Unlikely to Spark Consumer Boom, Think Tank WarnsFollowing a historic election victory, Japan’s ruling party is accelerating discussions to temporarily slash the consumption tax on food to zero. But a new research note by the Itochu Research Institute warns that the highly anticipated policy may fail to deliver meaningful economic stimulus—and will end up disproportionately benefitingJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
